name: Louse Ma Thoom (Almond Pate)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the toasted almonds in a food processor until they resemble very fine breadcrumbs.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil until the onions are tender.
3. Add all remaining ingredients to the skillet.
4. Sauté for approximately 5 minutes until the mushrooms are limp.
5. Transfer the mixture to the food processor and process with the almonds until well combined into a thick paste.
6. Place the pate in a shallow dish and surround with crackers, melba toast, pita chips, or French bread slices.
